S

SavedFrame - com.android.decode中的类
 
SavedFrame(String, long, int, int, FrameCaptureFormat, FrameCaptureMode) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.SavedFrame
 
ScannerOptions - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
ScannerOptions is the class that configures the scanner target beam and other scanner functionalities.
ScannerOptions(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerOptions
This is the constructor of ScannerOptions.
scannerOptions - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Provides configuration related to scanner functionalities.
ScannerProperties - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
ScannerProperties is the scanner property container class.
ScannerProperties(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
 
ScannerProperties() - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
This is an empty constructor that will not be used.
SEND_CODE_ID - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
sendChecksum - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.Code39
sendChecksum includes the checksum in the label transmission (if checksum is required with enableChecksum).
sendChecksum - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.Ean13
sendChecksum includes the checksum in the label transmission.
sendChecksum - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.Ean8
sendChecksum includes the checksum in the label transmission.
sendChecksum - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.Interleaved25
sendChecksum includes the checksum in the label transmission (if checksum is required with enableChecksum).
sendChecksum - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.Msi
sendChecksum includes the checksum in the label transmission.
sendChecksum - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.PostalRoyalMail
sendChecksum includes the Royal Mail checksum in the label transmission.
sendChecksum - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.UpcA
sendChecksum includes the checksum in the label transmission.
sendChecksum - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.UpcE
sendChecksum includes the checksum in the label transmission.
sendSystemDigit - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.Ean13
sendSystemDigit includes the system digit in the label transmission, it configures whether the first character should be transmitted.
sendSystemDigit - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.UpcA
sendSystemDigit includes the system digit in the label transmission.
sendSystemDigit - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.UpcE
sendSystemDigit includes the system digit in the label transmission.

Sets the desired value.
set(T) - 类 中的方法com.android.device.configuration.Property
Sets the generic object.
set(String) - 类 中的方法com.android.device.configuration.TextProperty

Set factory defaults for all barcode symbology types.

Sets one or more label programming parameters of type Integer.

Sets one or more label programming parameters of type Integer.

Sets one or more label programming parameters of type String.
setPropertyStrings(int[], String[]) - 接口 中的方法com.android.device.configuration.PropertyEditor
Sets one or more label programming parameters of type String.

setRange(int[]) - 类 中的方法com.android.device.configuration.CharacterProperty
 
setRange(int[]) - 类 中的方法com.android.device.configuration.EnumProperty
 
setRange(int[]) - 类 中的方法com.android.device.configuration.NumericProperty

setRange(int[]) - 类 中的方法com.android.device.configuration.TextProperty
 
setSupported(boolean) - 类 中的方法com.android.device.configuration.Property
 
setSystemProperty(String, String) - 类 中的方法com.android.advance.AdvanceManager
 
startDecode(int) - 类 中的方法com.android.decode.BarcodeManager
Call this method to start decoding.
startDecode() - 类 中的方法com.android.decode.BarcodeManager
Call this method to start decoding.
StartListener - com.android.decode中的接口
This interface is used by the application to listen to the scan started event.
stopDecode() - 类 中的方法com.android.decode.BarcodeManager
This stops any data acquisition currently in progress.
StopListener - com.android.decode中的接口
This interface is used by the application to listen to the scan stopped event.
storage - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.FrameCaptureConfiguration
storage enables the Scanner to store captured frames.
store(PropertyEditor, boolean) - 类 中的方法com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Provides a way to store the properties through a PropertyEditor.
store(PropertyEditor) - 类 中的方法com.android.device.configuration.Property
Stores the Property value, applying them.
store(PropertyEditor, boolean) - 类 中的方法com.android.device.configuration.PropertyGroup
Store the properties values contained by this property into the PropertyEditor.
store(PropertyEditor) - 类 中的方法com.android.device.configuration.TextProperty
Store the property value using the passed PropertyEditor.
storeError(Exception) - 枚举 中的方法com.android.device.ErrorManager.EMSingleton
 
storelist(PropertyEditor, ArrayList) - 类 中的静态方法com.android.device.configuration.Property
Stores and applies all the Properties and their current associated values.

Symbology - com.android.decode中的枚举
Symbology is an enumeration class defining constants for different barcode types.

SymbologyBase is the Symbologies Properties parent class.

SymbologyLengths is the class to set the minimum and maximum label lengths.
